message:
fix(channel,actor,gen_server): require &mut self for Receiver::recv and try_recv

Receiver methods that consume items from the channel must require
exclusive access (&mut self) rather than shared access (&self) for
soundness and API discipline. This propagates through:

- ActorCell and GenServerCell loop functions now take &mut references
  since they call mailbox.recv() internally
- Session Endpoint::recv() and Endpoint::offer() destructure rx as mut
- HTTP/1 IncomingBody and OutgoingBody clone cx to satisfy the borrow
  checker when calling self.receiver.recv()
- Benchmark closures and integration tests updated to bind mut rx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
